2605.20404.title: Puzzled By ChatGPT? No more! A Jigsaw Puzzle to Promote AI Literacy and Awareness
2605.20404.paper_summary: The rapid adoption of Generative AI, including LLM-based chatbots like ChatGPT, has highlighted the need for accessible ways to support public understanding and AI literacy. To address this need, we introduce a game-based, interactive approach in the form of a jigsaw puzzle whose completed image is a comic-based infographic illustrating the workings, capabilities, limitations, and societal implications of these technologies. Each comic sketch also functions as a standalone informational card, providing focused explanations of specific facets of AI use, design, and impact. The visual content was created in a live collaborative session with a professional illustrator and a multidisciplinary group of experts and non experts, combining structured knowledge with informal, exploratory reflections shared during the discussion. By integrating hands-on assembly, visual storytelling, and collaborative interaction, the puzzle provides an engaging and playful tool for exploring the mechanisms, perks, and perils of AI systems in informal learning contexts.
2605.20404.paper_summary_zh: 快速採用生成式人工智慧，包括基於大型語言模型的聊天機器人如ChatGPT，突顯了支持公眾理解和人工智慧素養的可獲得性需求。為了滿足這一需求，我們引入了一種基於遊戲的互動方法，形式為拼圖，其完成的圖像是一個基於漫畫的信息圖，說明這些技術的運作、能力、限制和社會影響。每個漫畫草圖也作為獨立的信息卡，提供對人工智慧使用、設計和影響的特定方面的集中解釋。視覺內容是在與專業插畫家及多學科專家和非專家的小組進行的現場合作會議中創建的，結合了結構化知識和在討論過程中分享的非正式探索性反思。通過整合動手組裝、視覺敘事和協作互動，這個拼圖提供了一個引人入勝且有趣的工具，用於在非正式學習環境中探索人工智慧系統的機制、優勢和風險。
2605.20404.author: Francesca Padovani et.al.
